title: 以下、スタックしている？ › 完遂せよ。マルチエージェントがマストの/kernel で進めて • Kernel orchestration is active for this session. Bootstrap target: requirements packet -> simulation gate -> hands-off execution. Active models: gpt-5, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.3- codex, GLM general-reviewer, Copilot Lane manifest: - Main lane: 統合と実装 - 残る...
summary_text: No new live x86 launch agents surfaced. The only confirmed current x86 runtime exposure is the old Codex sessions plus Docker’s privileged helper. 1. `codex` is still running on x86. `ps` shows PIDs `10468`, `10776`, and `12028` executing `/Users/masayuki/.nvm/versions/node/v22.19.0/lib/node_modules/@openai/codex/node_modules/@openai/codex-darwin-x64/vendor/x86_64-apple-darwin/codex/codex`, with parent `PID 10467` launched via `/Users/masayuki/.nvm/versions/node/v22.19.0/bin/codex`. The reintroduction paths are `[ /Users/masayuki/bin/codex ](/Users/masayuki/bin/codex#L5)` and `[ /Users/masayuki/bin/node ](/Users/masayuki/bin/node#L6)`, which both allow Intel fallback via `CODEX_USE_X64` / `NODE_USE_X86`. 2. `com.docker.vmnetd` is still x86_64. `ps` shows `PID 305` at `/Library/PrivilegedHelperTools/com.docker.vmnetd`, and `file` confirms that binary is `Mach-O 64-bit executable x86_64`. `launchctl print-disabled` still shows `com.docker.helper => enabled`, so Docker remains a live privileged-runtime surface. 3. The main reintroduction scripts are still hardcoded to the x64 Node path. `[ /Users/masayuki/Dev/e-stat-mcp/scripts/start-mcp.sh ](/Users/masayuki/Dev/e-stat-mcp/scripts/start-mcp.sh#L14)` and `[ /Users/masayuki/Dev/note-com-mcp/scripts/start-mcp.sh ](/Users/masayuki/Dev/note-com-mcp/scripts/start-mcp.sh#L14)` exec `/Users/masayuki/.nvm/versions/node/v22.19.0/bin/node`, and `[ /Users/masayuki/Dev/e-stat-mcp/scripts/smoke-live.sh ](/Users/masayuki/Dev/e-stat-mcp/scripts/smoke-live.sh#L25)` does the same in its JSON parser. These are not currently running x86 processes, but they will relaunch Intel Node when invoked. Non-issue now: `assistant-daemon` is on arm64 Node (`PID 53756`), with `[assistant-daemon.env](/Users/masayuki/.config/cloudflare-workers-hub/assistant-daemon.env#L16)` pinned to `/Users/masayuki/.local/node-arm64/bin/node` and `[assistant-daemon-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/assistant-daemon-runner.sh#L31)` honoring `NODE_BIN`.
